response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:36: Performance of 'Guns of Saxophone'. Identified composer from on-screen text as Yusuke Tsuchida (槌田祐亮). Searched for lyrics using title and composer, no official lyrics found. 2. 02:37-05:01: VTuber Todoroki Hajime talks about birthday merchandise and concludes the segment.
response.global_summary: Todoroki Hajime performs her song 'Guns of Saxophone' followed by an explanation of her birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Todoroki Hajime performs the song 'Guns of Saxophone'.
Todoroki Hajime explains merchandise details for her birthday, then concludes the segment.
